title: Fluentd Output Forward ACK Timeout and Node Ban Patterns
app: Fluentd `log_level debug` on forward output only in staging
spl:
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentd:log" OR sourcetype="fluentd:plugins"
| search "forward" AND ("ack" OR "timeout" OR "not responding" OR "connection refused")
| stats count by host, server_host, plugin_id
| sort -count
description: Persistent ACK failures drop backpressure signals and lose chunks upstream.
value: Highlights degraded upstream Splunk HEC or aggregator tiers.
implementation: Match `server_host` to load balancer VIP; alert before `hard_timeout` expels nodes.
